result: I would eliminate the inherent human bias towards "othering."  By dismantling the tendency to view those different from ourselves - in terms of race, religion, nationality, ideology, abilities, or any other characteristic - as inherently separate or less worthy, I believe we could foster a world of significantly greater empathy, understanding, and cooperation. This would address so many of the world's most pressing problems, from conflict and inequality to environmental degradation and lack of progress.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
